title: Head-destructure %User{id: id} instead of user.id access
prompt: Write `MyApp.Users.belongs_to?/2` as two function heads. One head should accept `%User{id: id}` and an attrs map `%{user_id: id}` and return `true`. The other head should match everything else and return `false`. Do NOT access `user.id` or `attrs.user_id` inside the function body. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Users do ... end` (with `alias MyApp.User`).
tier_rationale: Direct head-destructuring pattern; the pinning-via-rebind trick is the intended lesson but it's a textbook idiom.
